g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
Wood interior & metal exterior doors/Vinyl frame double pane glazing
Combination of carpet, tile and vinyl flooring
Landscaping around the building perimeter consists of shrubs and trees. The
landscaping is well established and well maintained.
The subject provides 30 spaces. The parking ratio of 1.3 per unit is within the
typical range of spaces per unit and within zoning requirements.
24.6% (7,500 SF footprint / 30,514 SF site), which is within market standards for
similar walkup buildings in the area.
The building will feature a functional Walkup design with typical site coverage
A Phase I report was not provided. This appraisal assumes that the
improvements are constructed free of all hazardous waste and toxic materials,
including (but not limited to) unseen asbestos and mold. Please refer to the
Assumptions and Limiting Conditions section regarding this issue.
